payload.text:
Private trading signals, delivered to you by DM.

• Live alerts when a new signal is published
• Daily digest at your chosen local time
• History of recent signals

Open /start for the menu. Access is invite-only.

Signals are suggestions only — not financial advice. You decide what to trade.
